recentTweets.text:
ICE and their contractors are completely out of control. Everyone has the right to protest peacefully without fear of violence. 

We’re keeping the victim of this shooting in our thoughts, and we will keep fighting to end this lawlessness and instill accountability.

Wildfires are burning everywhere, from Canada to Colorado. 

This is a climate emergency. It shouldn’t take smoke covering D.C. to force Congress to take action. We need all hands on deck NOW.

Disaster relief should never be political. These are communities that are hurting and have been through the worst times of their lives. It’s so far below our shared American values and is unacceptable. https://t.co/h97WyObk7R

President Trump is once again peddling conspiracies to distract from his failures and doubling down on his efforts to make it harder to vote. 

As governor, we expanded Colorado’s mail-in voting system, which Democrats and Republicans trust because it’s convenient, safe, and

BREAKING: Tina Peters, who tried to undermine Colorado’s free and fair election system, will reportedly be in DC for Trump’s bogus election fraud speech tonight. 

No matter how many lies Donald Trump, Tina Peters, or other election deniers tell, we will keep fighting to protect https://t.co/ycbUDDskkO

Remember when Trump said his illegal war with Iran would be over in just a few weeks? 

Well, it’s been 139 days and he still has no plan to get us out of it and bring down costs for you at home. https://t.co/Icc9M4E0PD

Our immigration system is broken. Firing immigration judges who follow the law and refuse to bend to Donald Trump isn’t how we make the system work better. It’s un-American. 
https://t.co/AFiL4g803Z

Trump is going to lie again tonight. He’ll lie about past elections as a way to justify corrupting our future elections. The same elections that delivered him and Republicans total control of our government. 

The truth is: our elections are safe, secure, and more accessible than

Americans: Affordable housing, gas, groceries please?

Trump: Best I can do is a coin with my face on it.
 https://t.co/NLUhcdsWBc

Our visit to the Aspen Acres burn site was just heartbreaking. Homes destroyed and lives turned upside down.

Our eternal gratitude goes out to our first responders and emergency teams who are putting everything on the line to protect our neighbors and communities. https://t.co/E4vTkQbKDg

Trump’s economy and his illegal war with Iran are ballooning gas prices for Colorado families. 

A president who claims to put Americans first is doing the exact opposite. https://t.co/67EB0l7sVC

The victims of Jeffrey Epstein deserve accountability and justice. 

Release the Epstein files and investigate all involved NOW.

At least 4 people are dead this year because of ICE. Trump wants these reckless traffic stops to continue. 

Not one more penny for ICE and its lawlessness.

Our communities need all the resources they can get to combat this devastating wildfire season. We saw this firsthand visiting Beulah. 

Trump’s cuts to the Forest Service and his politicization of FEMA funding puts the safety of Americans last. https://t.co/2YOe6LvLSv

“We know we can’t prevent every wildfire. But to meet this new reality, local, state and federal governments as well as citizens, must work together.”

Read more from my op-ed in the Colorado Sun:  
https://t.co/uAPDj6tH2K

This is a blatant attack on public lands everywhere. 

Our public lands are part of our shared heritage. Removing protections and paving the way for mining and drilling on beloved landscapes goes against the values of the West.

Trump is continuing his deadly illegal war in Iran, spending billions of taxpayer funds and sending costs skyrocketing for Americans. 

His so-called “deal” has fallen apart, and it’s clear he has ZERO plan to get us out. End this war. NOW.
https://t.co/TtzS2v0ovo
RT @Rep_Stansbury: In New Mexico we know water is life. But, we also know that our communities are facing a difficult time right now as our…

RT @SenWarren: Our bipartisan housing bill is now the law.

For every family where the American Dream of owning your own home feels like it…

This photo says what words can't.

We saw firsthand the damage the Aspen Acres wildfire has had on Coloradans. Homes gone. Lives upended. Communities forever changed.

We're fighting to make sure Colorado gets every resource and dollar it needs to rebuild and recover from these https://t.co/E6cRpIUtcB

Just days after killing another person in Texas, ICE is involved in another fatal shooting in Maine. 

ICE is out of control. Not one more penny for ICE until there’s transparency, accountability, and justice. 
https://t.co/eGwwbytq0H

ICE is terrorizing our communities, separating families, and killing innocent people. A new facility in Hudson will make a horrible situation even worse. 

We’re fighting against this detention center and for basic answers from this lawless agency. 
https://t.co/ldZWWdw9D4

Devastating news. Our hearts are with the loved ones of the pilot involved. The first responders to these horrific wildfires deserve our eternal gratitude for their courage and bravery. Our communities are safer because of them. 
https://t.co/BmGAtFEdcE
Our rural communities are the engines of our economy. Great to be in Walsenburg to hear more about what Washington can do to help small businesses and towns across Colorado. https://t.co/c5ojKlud8P
Sorry to hear of Senator Graham’s sudden passing. My thoughts are with his family, friends, and staff.

Got the chance to celebrate a project to improve affordable housing in Saguache. 

Housing should be for families, not Wall Street banks. https://t.co/qa1aEnfwjU

Despite President Trump’s efforts, our bipartisan ROAD to Housing Act just became law!

Our bill will help housing be more affordable for Americans AND: 

→ Stop Wall Street from buying up homes 

→ Expand housing services for veterans

→ BUILD MORE HOMES!

While in the San Luis Valley, we heard about how the West’s historic drought, Trump’s illegal tariffs, and the illegal war in Iran are making life that much more difficult for Colorado farmers. https://t.co/MbsnExL0ca

As we enter what is already a devastating wildfire season, firefighters and emergency management staff are working around the clock to keep Coloradans as safe as possible. 

Visit the website here to learn more about fires currently burning and resources available to you:

The cost of chaos isn’t paid in Washington. It’s paid by Americans in the grocery store, at the gas pump, and anywhere you choose to spend your money. 

Trump needs to end his illegal war. Stop the illegal tariffs. And put lowering costs for working families at the top of the

Disaster relief should never be political. 

The President is leaving Americans to pick up the pieces after disasters based on petty political grievances.

The politicization of disaster aid is disgraceful and shameful.

We’re here with crews in Buena Vista who are fighting the Willow fire. 

We must do everything we can across every level of government to make sure these crews and communities have everything they need. https://t.co/NTCYYUDVoU

What Trump’s doing: 

→Enriching himself and his family
 
→Starting costly forever wars
 
→Cutting $1 trillion from our healthcare system

→Botching vanity projects 

What we’re doing: 

✅Passed a bill to make housing more affordable 

✅Voting to end his illegal war and

Firefighters in Colorado are sacrificing everything to protect our communities against active wildfires. We all owe our brave first responders a debt of gratitude – and our commitment to help stop future wildfires.
https://t.co/lGAaeYhGE2

Another photo-op for an administration that's only currency is lies. 

Americans are feeling the pain of soaring gas prices because of Trump’s illegal war with Iran.

We are closely tracking the wildfires burning in Colorado. 

Colorado communities are resilient and tough. We’re fighting for the resources and assistance they need during this catastrophic fire season. https://t.co/1G8AMzBlEU

Trump’s illegal war continues to be a disaster for our country and the world.

Americans don’t want forever wars. They want an affordable life and a government that puts their needs first. 

End this illegal war NOW.

We won’t forget the bravery and sacrifice of the three firefighters lost battling the Snyder Fire. 

Our hearts are with them and the injured firefighters recovering now. https://t.co/L0g1ExARWQ

Our communities have been torn apart by gun violence too many times. Loved ones lost and a sense of security destroyed. 

The Trump administration is making all of us less safe by rolling back common-sense gun reforms. 
https://t.co/Eph4rZJFeK
Great to be with Coloradans in Glenwood Springs over the holiday weekend! https://t.co/Whh5aTy8G0
A man who mistakes gold for greatness will end up with neither. https://t.co/8RyhhfcEkX

Had the chance to meet with community members in Meeker and listen to how we can help Coloradans recover from last year’s devastating Elk and Lee Fires. 
 As Colorado battles more wildfires, we have no time to waste to support the impacted communities. https://t.co/DSAOowGkbw
Brazen corruption from the President of the United States. https://t.co/fVr0gt8fwb

Colorado is at the beginning of what is already a devastating wildfire season. 

We urge every Coloradan to stay alert and check for updates. 

We’ll keep fighting for federal resources that can help our communities and first responders stay safe.

It’s been one year since Trump and MAGA passed their One Big Ugly Betrayal Bill and pulled the rug out on the American people, all to give tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy. 

Because of this cruel bill, we’ll see:

• 26,000 Coloradans kicked off SNAP
• 240,000 Coloradans at risk

Happy 4th of July, Colorado! 

As we celebrate America’s 250th birthday, we’re also celebrating the Centennial State’s 150th this year! 

Hoping everyone can get out and enjoy time with family and friends and some good food today.

We’re on the ground near Steamboat where conditions are ripe for wildfires.

This megadrought is an emergency. All of us, across the state, need to work together to address our water future. https://t.co/MJoN5mLMYj

There’s no doubt climate change is shaping this fire season in Colorado. 

Our communities are in the middle of a megadrought. Our water resources are stretched thin. Our snowpack is at historic lows. 

This is a climate emergency.
https://t.co/O2k0R9CTy5

It’s been a week since President Trump threw a tantrum and refused to pass a bipartisan bill to lower housing costs for Americans. 

We need to get this bill across the finish line and make homes affordable for working families.
We’re forever grateful for our servicemembers as we head into July 4th weekend. https://t.co/EPUFFhdTIl

Trump’s economy only works for the ultra-wealthy, not YOU. 

Trump and his cronies are banking billions off the backs of working Americans who are getting the short end of the stick year over year. 
https://t.co/mi5VbrILI2
Climate change is here and now. It’s time to take action and protect our communities. https://t.co/LtgE9Jf40v
RT @RepPettersen: The West is on fire and Trump has completely gutted our efforts to combat climate change. https://t.co/zgaSxlKsdP

Colorado communities are under evacuation orders and covered in smoke. The West is experiencing a historic 1,200 year megadrought. 

This is an all-hands-on-deck emergency. Firefighters and communities need resources NOW to keep themselves and all of us safe.

Scam after scam after scam. 

While you’re struggling to afford groceries, housing, and healthcare, Trump and his family are banking billions on crypto scams. 

The most corrupt administration in our nation’s history.

President Trump’s priorities are clear: a giant ballroom for himself while blocking a bipartisan bill that will help working families buy homes.
https://t.co/fINYxsRQWR

While hundreds of thousands of Coloradans were making their voices heard yesterday, Tina Peters and Donald Trump were in the Oval Office undermining confidence in our democracy.

Colorado’s elections are free, fair, and secure. We’ll keep fighting to protect your right to vote https://t.co/WUrRODsK16

Election Day in Colorado is over, but the real work continues.

Working people are facing a cost-of-living emergency, and America is facing the most corrupt administration in our nation’s history.

There’s no time to waste. It’s time to work harder and harder. It’s time to giddy

Birthright citizenship is guaranteed by the Constitution.

Even a MAGA-engineered Supreme Court wouldn't buy Trump's bogus reading of the Constitution. 

But this isn't Trump's first or last attempt to trample the Constitution. We'll fight him at every turn.

Today is Election Day, Colorado! 🗳️ 

Find your nearest polling place here: https://t.co/Qt7gK7Y9jN

assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 1 Kurdistan Lens tweet hit for John W. Hickenlooper. The social-media posture reads as kurdistan-adjacent regional signal because the strongest matched frame is Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language. Top matched terms: Oil / Energy.

Mail-in voting is safe and secure.  

As governor of Colorado, we created the gold-standard mail-in voting system because we know every American deserves to have their voices heard.  

Today’s decision reinforces that every vote counts and states have the right over their own
We are the wealthiest nation in the history of the world. Every American deserves healthcare that is affordable and accessible. Full stop.

Denver Pride was electric today! Great to see everyone celebrating our LGBTQ+ community as we continue the fight to make sure everyone has the freedom to be who they are and love who they love. 🏳️‍🌈 https://t.co/v9BErebp7S

Colorado Pastor Edward Nalwamba should be with his own congregation today. Instead, he's being detained at the Aurora ICE detention facility and faces deportation to Uganda where his safety is at risk.

We met with Pastor Nalwamba today during an oversight visit to the Aurora ICE https://t.co/e9lcuma5Lh

Roads. Bridges. Water. Airports. All laying the foundation for a stronger Colorado. https://t.co/CPEvIhhXWu
RT @SenJeffMerkley: There are a million reasons to pass the Equality Act. Here are just a few. https://t.co/XbeP7ylvsO
